toolChanges.reason: No Java or Kotlin files in repository — PMD7 has no valid targets in this TypeScript/JavaScript/React stack

patternChanges.reason: Convention mismatch: the entire design system is built on hex colors (e.g. #1a1a1a, #ffffff) — >80% of CSS files use hex intentionally. Keeping this rule would generate 56 false positives on intentional design decisions.

Cross-tool deduplication: Stylelint declaration-no-important covers the same concern for CSS files. Both tools were flagging identical lines in the same .css/.module.css files, producing duplicate issues. Stylelint is the dedicated CSS tool.

Raised medium CCN threshold to match React SPA complexity profile. Functions with CCN 8–11 (analytics loaders, animation helpers, security validators) are expected complexity for this codebase — only genuinely complex functions (CCN 12+) remain flagged.
Raised medium NLOC threshold for React TSX. JSX components are naturally verbose — a 60-line TSX function is often just JSX markup. Only functions >75 lines are flagged as medium.

noisyButKept: Biome_lint_security_noSecrets: 8 false positives (SVG path data, CSS selectors, DOM attribute names) excluded per-file. Pattern kept active for future code changes. Covered files excluded: public/offline.js, src/utils/env.ts, src/utils/keyboard.ts, src/utils/metaTags.ts

keyImprovements: Removed 56 noise issues from Stylelint color-no-hex — the entire design system intentionally uses hex colors (#1a1a1a, #ffffff palette), this rule is incompatible with the project's design conventions.
Eliminated 29 duplicate !important violations — both Stylelint and Biome were flagging identical CSS lines. Kept Stylelint (dedicated CSS tool), disabled Biome's redundant CSS rule.

Lizard complexity thresholds tuned to React SPA profile — 18 borderline-medium issues removed while all genuinely complex functions (FeedbackWidget CCN=57, EmailCapture CCN=49) remain flagged for refactoring.
Excluded 8 noSecrets false positives (SVG data, CSS selectors, DOM attribute strings) from specific files while keeping the pattern active for future code.
Removed PMD7 (Java/Kotlin linter) — has no valid targets in this TypeScript/React codebase.
Analysis runtime dropped from 77.5s to 12.8s (83% faster) due to removal of PMD7 and dependency caching.
